title: DingDuff cite-check attorney review record (review.json), schema v1
description: Attorney verdicts on the citations in a cites.json. Kept in a separate file so regenerating cites.json never clobbers attorney work; verdicts carry forward across regenerations via binds_to.

reviews.description: Keyed by citation id from cites.json.

verdict.description: ✅ verified · ⚠️ needs_attention (supports the proposition but with a caveat the note should explain) · ‼️ rejected. Pre-round-2 files may carry the retired values 'misquoted'/'wrong_pin'; consumers map them to rejected/needs_attention respectively.

binds_to.description: SHA-256 of cite_text + "\u0000" + proposition for the reviewed citation. A verdict whose binds_to no longer matches the regenerated citation is stale and must be shown for reference only, not applied.
